testsuite.name: EbayTests

testcase.name: categoryFilterApply

failure.message: org.openqa.selenium.InvalidSelectorException: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression //a[normalize-space()='Cell phones & accessories'])[1] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '//a[normalize-space()='Cell phones & accessories'])[1]' is not a valid XPath expression.
